summary: Diagnostic-only TCBarcode logs were added for the bridge, main dispatch, object state, capture lifecycle, presentation, metadata callback, cancellation, and caller wait; barcode values are not logged.
limitation: No physical iOS device or deployed minimal test application was available, so no freeze reproduction, thread dump, camera capture, Xcode build, or device validation was performed.

command: xcrun xctrace list devices; find TotalCrossVM/xcode/Debug-iphonesimulator -maxdepth 4 -type f -name TotalCross -perm -111 -print
summary: Xcode tooling listed the host and iOS simulators only; the scoped executable search returned no deployed TotalCross application.
limitation: A simulator is insufficient evidence for the reported physical-camera freeze; connect an iOS device and deploy the minimal scanner application before continuing milestone 1.

summary: The user explicitly waived tests and physical-device reproduction. Milestone 1 closes on completed static analysis and diagnostic instrumentation only.
limitation: No physical-device freeze, thread stack, camera capture, or scanner presentation result was observed; do not represent device behavior as validated.

summary: The pure-C session state test passed for start eligibility, valid transitions, repeated-finalization rejection, stale-generation rejection, concurrent-start rejection, and pre-session finish rejection.
limitation: The Objective-C syntax check stopped before mainview.m because YTPlayerView.h is absent; no Xcode build or physical-device validation was performed.

summary: Exited 1 at TotalCrossVM/src/nm/ui/darwin/mainview.h with fatal error: YTPlayerView.h file not found.
limitation: The failure precedes the modified source and reflects an unavailable pre-existing CocoaPods dependency; do not treat it as a compile result for the milestone-2 implementation.

summary: The scanner uses mountBarcodeOverlay:generation: and layoutBarcodeOverlay; barwindow remains only in diagnostic state logging and mountBarCodeWindow no longer exists. The overlay owns the preview, highlight, and accessible Cancel control.
limitation: No device or simulator presentation test was performed; physical-device validation remains waived and the standalone Objective-C syntax check remains blocked by absent YTPlayerView.h.

summary: The state test passed and static inspection confirms asynchronous permission, session-owned serial capture work, input/output validation, metadata filtering, and startRunning outside the main queue.
limitation: No mocked integration or device test was run; Objective-C syntax/build remains unavailable because YTPlayerView.h is absent.

summary: The state test passed; scanner readBarcode uses one semaphore wait, queues UI start asynchronously, rejects main-thread callers, and schedules a 15-second setup timeout. Remaining Sleep(100) sites belong to unrelated camera functionality.
limitation: No thread dump, mocked integration, or device test was run; Objective-C syntax/build remains unavailable because YTPlayerView.h is absent.

summary: The state test and diff check passed; static inspection confirms UTF-8 byte-length allocation, C-side free after object creation, NSString repeated-value comparison, and lifecycle cancellation observer.
limitation: No device matrix or Xcode build was run; Objective-C syntax/build remains unavailable because YTPlayerView.h is absent.

command: cd TotalCrossVM/xcode && cmake ../ -GXcode && pod install && ruby ../../scripts/fix-ios-xcode-dependencies.rb TCVM.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj && xcodebuild -workspace TotalCross.xcworkspace -scheme TotalCross -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator build
summary: xcodebuild exited 65 during ScanDependencies for PBKDF2WithHmacSHA1.c: axtls/axtls_pbkdf2.h file not found.
limitation: The failure precedes scanner compilation. CMake/CocoaPods changed generated Xcode workspace/project files that are deliberately left uncommitted.

command: cd TotalCrossVM/xcode && cmake ../ -GXcode -DCMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME=iOS -DCMAKE_OSX_SYSROOT=iphoneos -DCMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES=arm64 && pod install && pod install && ruby ../../scripts/fix-ios-xcode-dependencies.rb tcvm.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj && xcodebuild -workspace TotalCross.xcworkspace -scheme TotalCross BUILD_DIR=${PWD} -configuration Release -sdk iphoneos -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -archivePath build/TotalCross.xcarchive -resultBundlePath build/logs/TotalCross-retry3.xcresult CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO archive
summary: The updated depot tools provide axtls/axtls_pbkdf2.h for iOS arm64. A second pod install integrated the tcvm Pods configuration after the local xcodeproj compatibility warning; the patch completed and xcodebuild exited 0, producing build/TotalCross.xcarchive and build/logs/TotalCross-retry3.xcresult.
limitation: No simulator interaction or physical-device scan was performed. The user explicitly waived physical-device tests and reproduction. Generated Xcode, Pods, archive, and result artifacts remain uncommitted.
